also height length is short to tall

two time → noob → elliot

Like always, after Elliot finally clocks out from work, she texts the group chat and tells everyone to assemble in the same alley near her workplace. She needs a few minutes to change her outfit before picking everyone up in the Builder Brothers Pizza car (yes the red one from the game)

You, TwoTime, and Noob sit on the benches, waiting for Elliot while thinking about what you’re all going to do tonight.

TwoTime suggests drinking at your place and maybe inviting someone along, like Sixer or Azure, to turn it into a small party. Noob doesn’t seem to mind the conversation and keeps eating a snack she brought with her.

After a while, you notice headlights in the distance—it looks like Elliot has arrived. The car slows down as it approaches, and Elliot rolls down the window and tells everyone to hop in.
